'''Tiom Rordan''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] in the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="Exile" /> Stationed aboard the [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] ''[[Mawrunner]]'', he began dating [[Syal Antilles]],<ref name="Fury" /> to the tacit disapproval of her father, [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]].<ref name="Exile" /> After less than a year of dating, they decided to be [[Marriage/Legends|married]] after the end of the war. However, when the [[Second Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Galactic Alliance Second Fleet]], including ''Mawrunner'', was ordered to accompany the Galactic Alliance [[Chief of State (Galactic Alliance)|Chief of State]] to negotiations with the [[Confederation]], the Confederation activated the [[Centerpoint Station]] [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]], obliterating the Second Fleet and killing Rordan. His fiancée was devastated following his death, which also cost her the rest of her [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]].<ref name="Fury">''[[Legacy of the Force: Fury]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Tiom Rordan has appeared in two ''[[Star Wars]]'' works thus far in the form of two [[Star Wars: Legacy of the Force]] novels, ''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]'' and ''[[Legacy of the Force: Fury]]'', both written by [[Aaron Allston]]. His name was not revealed until ''Fury'', and he never made a direct appearance, being only mentioned in both cases.
